title: actions request

items.description: Action-specific category input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

category.description: Ordered category entries. Each item must satisfy the declared item contract.

items.description: Action-specific requires input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

requires.description: Ordered requires entries. Each item must satisfy the declared item contract.

items.description: Action-specific purposes input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

purposes.description: Ordered purposes entries. Each item must satisfy the declared item contract.

keyword.description: Action-specific keyword input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

filter.description: Structured filter configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

path.description: Action-specific path input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

file_format.description: Action-specific file_format input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

verbose.description: Action-specific verbose input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

output.description: Export destination and rendering controls. path, file_format, and verbose are supported only where this action declares them.

description: List the public xdebug action catalog.
x-purpose: 列出当前运行时公开 action catalog。
x-how_it_works: 默认返回 compact action names；args.output.verbose=true 时返回 descriptors，并同时返回 removed/modes。
x-when_to_use: 让 agent 在调用前发现真实可用能力。
x-description-zh: 列出当前运行时公开 action catalog。

use_when: 需要发现当前 runtime 公开的 action、状态和适用资源。
do_not_use_when: 已经知道 action 且需要它的字段、枚举或 response 合同。

alternatives.when: 需要一个已知 action 的完整调用合同。
